programme.title: Jericho
programme.desc: A mysterious gunman searches for his lost identity.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: A pre-teen rebel in WWII-occupied France unites a group of kids to protect a young Jewish girl from Nazis.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is an assassin in love. But a picture-perfect marriage will not save the couple from becoming targets.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Crank
programme.desc: An assassin learns his rival has injected him with a poison that will kill him if his heart rate drops.

programme.title: Catch 44
programme.desc: Three friends get caught in a standoff with a psychopath, a truck driver, a line cook, and head crime boss.

programme.title: Frank and Jesse
programme.desc: Frank and Jesse James embark on a mission for revenge after their younger brother is murdered.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: An entire team disappeared while on an expedition into the Grand Canyon in search of a rumored hidden city.

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: High-school students start a vigilante group. But as their power increases, they become more dangerous.

programme.title: Best of Times
programme.desc: A small-town loser determines to have one more shot at the big time by winning a football game.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: When a woman discovers her husband is having an affair, she seeks refuge with her estranged sister Bif.

programme.title: Superhero Movie
programme.desc: An orphaned teenager is bitten by a radioactive dragonfly, granting him superhuman powers.

programme.title: Vamps
programme.desc: Two socialite vampires in New York City fall in love while being pursued by vampire hunters.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
